description: A driver has a load with three delivery stops. A dispatcher needs to sequence the stops to create the most efficient route.

nodes.task_description: Enter the locations of the three delivery stops into a route optimization tool.
The tool calculates the most efficient sequence for the stops based on road networks and expected traffic.

expected_outcome.value: An optimal stop sequence (e.g., B, then A, then C) is generated.

nodes.task_description: Send the optimized route and stop sequence to the driver.

expected_outcome.value: The driver receives the most efficient route to follow.
